title: Chef Aid Traditional Baster, Essential Kitchen Gadget for Basting While Roasting to Keep you Roasted Meats Suculent, Made with BPA free Plastic with Measurements White
features: COOK SUCCULENT ROASTS: Our Chef Aid basting tool distribute the juice over your roast to keep it succulent and prevent extra drying
EVERDAY USE: This Baster is a great everyday essential tool for use around the Kitchen and being made from high quaility super strong BPA Free Polypropylene is is easy to keep clean

EASY TO USE: The meat baster has extra strong suction. Simply push your baster in the juice and squeeze the baster bulb, this will hold the juice until you angle the long reach baster over the top of the roasting joint
DISHWASHER, FREEZER AND FRIDGE SAFE: With a removable Bulb this Baster is easy to clean by hand
CHEF AID: Offers an extensive range of products for the Kitchen and Home that are affordable without compromising on quality
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality. A complete range of solutions for the home.
